claimText: The Metre Convention of 1875 aims to assure the international unification and improvement of the metric system.
evidenceExcerpt: The Metre Convention of 1875 aims to assure the international unification and improvement of the metric system.
examUse: Statement-based question on the objective of the Metre Convention.

claimText: The Metre Convention established the International Bureau of Weights and Measures (BIPM).
evidenceExcerpt: Created the International Bureau of Weights and Measures (BIPM) to develop and maintain a universal measurement system.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the founding treaty of the BIPM.
distractorHooks: Established by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO)

claimText: India is a member state of the Metre Convention.
evidenceExcerpt: India is a member of the Metre Convention.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding India's membership in international measurement conventions.
distractorHooks: India is only an observer state
